workspaces.name: HackMate AI Devs
workspaces.description: Building the future of team memory graphs inside Slack.

workspaces.name: ISRO Hackathon
workspaces.description: Developing real-time telemetry algorithms and multi-satellite trajectory trackers.

workspaces.name: Slack AI Team
workspaces.description: Leveraging large language models for natural language knowledge graphs inside Slack streams.

workspaces.name: Design Sprint
workspaces.description: Rapid prototyping of next-gen interactive glassmorphism UI interfaces and sleek micro-interactions.

tasks.title: Design System & Glassmorphism UI
tasks.description: Create a high-fidelity glassmorphic design theme with light background panels, blue accent colors, elastic transitions, and circular micro-animations inspired by Linear.

comments.content: Finished the design assets in Figma and exported them! Integrating them with Tailwind CSS now.
This layout looks super clean and premium. Perfect match for the mood guidelines!

tasks.title: Set up Cognee Memory Graph & Node schemas
tasks.description: Define cognitive architecture with schemas for Tasks, Documents, and Decisions. Ensure proper node relationship mapping.

comments.content: Mapped the entities: Workspace -> has_member -> User, Document -> references -> Technology, Decision -> made_in -> SlackChannel.

tasks.title: Integrate Gemini API with Slack Webhooks
tasks.description: Build a server-side route that listens to Slack events, extracts queries with `@HackMate`, retrieves background context from Cognee memory, and responds directly inside the Slack thread.

tasks.title: Extract Entities & Build Relational Graph
tasks.description: Leverage Gemini 3.5 Flash for natural language processing on chat logs to identify technical decisions, assign tasks, and populate Cognee knowledge graph automatically.

comments.content: Entity extraction working with 94% accuracy. Ready to review on pull request #4.

tasks.title: Optimize Space Telemetry Parser Algorithm
tasks.description: Improve JSON telemetry streaming parsing efficiency from 250ms to sub-10ms for multi-satellite coordinate arrays.

tasks.title: Calibrate Orbital Trajectory Vectors
tasks.description: Verify 3D coordinates using Keplerian elements and update satellite orbital edges in the central telemetry graph.

tasks.title: Optimize NLP Semantic Thread Chunker
tasks.description: Develop custom heuristic overlap patterns for high-frequency Slack channels to avoid context leakage in summarization.

tasks.title: Interactive Slack Slash Commands Layout
tasks.description: Design beautiful block-kit layout templates for displaying the current Cognee memory graph directly in-channel.

tasks.title: Animate Workspace Switcher Dropdown
tasks.description: Build a premium interactive workspace picker using Framer Motion with ease-in-out scaling, rotation, and spring physics.

tasks.title: Glassmorphic Sidebar Overhaul
tasks.description: Apply ultra-modern translucent visual backdrops and custom micro-interactions to navigation toggles.

documents.name: Architecture Specification.md
documents.summary: Technical architecture specification of the HackMate AI workspace platform, describing the data sync flow and Cognitive memory pipeline.

keyPoints: Express server serves as the full-stack routing controller and hosts static production files.
Gemini 3.5 Flash handles automated summary generation, document analysis, and conversational assistant features.
Cognee acts as the primary cognitive memory layer mapping relationships between documents, decisions, and tasks.
Slack synchronization listens for channel logs and parses keywords for instant relational graph updates.
decisions: Approved: Use Express and Vite Dev Middleware instead of dual server setup to streamline container resources.
Approved: Implement local storage JSON fallback for immediate reliability before migrating to persistent database.

documents.name: Pitch Deck Outline.pdf
documents.summary: Strategic presentation deck framing HackMate AI as a key teammate for high-performance engineering groups to minimize knowledge loss.

keyPoints: Teams lose up to 30% of critical decisions in high-velocity projects due to fragmented Slack discussions.
Onboarding new developers takes days instead of seconds due to outdated documentation.
HackMate AI offers cognitive thread stitching, providing zero-effort instant onboarding.

documents.name: Document.pdf
documents.summary: This document outlines the Dreamy Style Palette web application created by Sanskriti Maheshwari, which serves as a style curation and color palette generation tool.

keyPoints: Introduces the Dreamy Style Palette web application
Developed and authored by Sanskriti Maheshwari
Accessible online through the Lovable.app platform
decisions: Utilize Lovable.app for application generation and hosting
Deploy the solution as an interactive web-based utility for design style exploration

Explains the advantages of event-driven synchronization for multi-agent workflows.
decisions: Proposed: Align target milestones in bharatcodexacadmixudeasubmissioncertificate.pdf with our current team capacity.

chatMessages.content: According to our **Cognee memory graph** (linked to Slack channel **#tech-stack** and **Architecture Specification.md**), we decided to use **Express + Vite Middleware** for our backend architecture instead of FastAPI. This ensures rapid TypeScript stripping and direct hot-reload asset-serving in our unified Cloud Run container. This decision was proposed by Alex Rivera and approved by Sarah Jenkins on July 2nd.

Hello! I've searched our **Cognee Long-Term Memory Graph** representing your hackathon workspace.

We currently have 2 active tasks, 0 analyzed documents, and 0 recorded decisions. To help you build out, you can ask me details about tech choices, team progress, or document contents! Let me know what you need me to find in our knowledge graph.

decisions.description: Deploy our unified container onto Google Cloud Run to exploit rapid container cold-starts and serverless scalability.

slackSyncLogs.message: I think we should use Express rather than FastAPI. It aligns better with our React/Vite development container and streamlines type safety.
slackSyncLogs.aiResponse: Recorded decision proposed by Alex Rivera: "Use Express + Vite Middleware for full-stack integration" in Cognee memory.

slackSyncLogs.message: Agreed! Express is perfect. Let's make sure we bundle it nicely with esbuild for production.
slackSyncLogs.aiResponse: Recorded agreement on decision "Use Express + Vite Middleware for full-stack integration". Status updated to APPROVED.

slackSyncLogs.message: @HackMate AI do we have any pending deadlines for the Design System?
slackSyncLogs.aiResponse: Responding inside Slack channel general: Sarah Jenkins is assigned to "Design System & Glassmorphism UI" which is due on 2026-07-03. Current status is IN_PROGRESS.

slackDailySummaries.summary: The team discussed and finalized the backend technology stack. They approved Express.js coupled with Vite development middleware to power the unified full-stack server.
decisions: Approved: Use Express + Vite Middleware for full-stack integration
nextSteps: Alex to set up Cognee memory graph node schemas
Sarah to finalize glassmorphic design specifications

slackDailySummaries.summary: Synced Slack daily notes and summarized architectural decisions. The team successfully resolved design asset delivery and completed full deployment setups.
decisions: Use Express + Vite Middleware for full-stack integration
Deploy on Cloud Run instead of AWS ECS
Utilize Lovable.app for application generation and hosting
nextSteps: Integrate Gemini API with Slack Webhooks (medium)

joinRequests.intro: Fullstack developer focusing on API design and machine learning pipeline integration. Have experience with fast-paced hackathons and real-time streams.
joinRequests.whyJoin: I am highly fascinated by the Cognee persistent graph memory design. I want to build out modular webhook listeners for Slack and expand node relationships!

aiRecommendation.reason: This applicant's skills closely match the current project requirements.

joinRequests.intro: Research scholar in NLP and vector embeddings. Built multiple custom semantic caching systems and fine-tuned smaller models.
joinRequests.whyJoin: To research optimal chunk boundaries for the Cognee Memory Engine.

aiRecommendation.reason: Unmatched experience with relational graph schemas and transformer embeddings.

joinRequests.intro: Digital product artist. Focused entirely on clean web designs, accessibility, and playful retro styling.
joinRequests.whyJoin: To design a gorgeous, custom playground for the knowledge graph view.
joinRequests.rejectionReason: The project is currently focusing on backend and AI engine developers. We have saved your contact details for future design iterations.

aiRecommendation.reason: While highly creative, current immediate requirements lean towards implementation engineers.
